title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ecom Express Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ecom Express Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Ecom Express Holdings Services family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Ecom Express Holdings Services:
Ecom Express Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express Holdings Services!
